commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor proof plus maintainer product/API review; automation cannot supply the missing live WhatsApp evidence or choose the final reaction/poll/event surface.; Needs attention: The diff adds no dependency or CI supply-chain surface, but it introduces a concrete WhatsApp hook privacy bypass for gated group messages.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve poll vote payloads — extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/monitor.... (sha=e4b9363e8f18f90f5b81841136ac8d1f25387914)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds WhatsApp inbound extraction/listeners for polls, reactions, events and RSVPs, gated-group internal hook firing, tests, and also changes gateway timeouts, poll-param detection, and tsdown build entries.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level review: current main lacks the WhatsApp update/reaction/event ingress paths, and the PR diff plus pinned Baileys contracts show the failing payload and privacy paths. I did not run live WhatsApp validation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor proof plus maintainer product/API review; automation cannot supply the missing live WhatsApp evidence or choose the final reaction/poll/event surface.

target.title: feat(whatsapp): add poll, reaction, event, and RSVP message support
target.author: chenvaltzer
